message:
feat(fuzz): add fuzz_c11threads (bd-dvr22 priority-8, last non-TSan item)

## FULL REVIEW MODE verification

cargo test --workspace --all-targets this turn: only bd-9hq64
(pthread_key_create destructor not invoked on thread exit) still
failing, already filed. No new regressions. clippy --workspace
--all-targets -- -D warnings clean.

## Fuzz gap — bd-dvr22 priority-8 (c11threads, final non-TSan)

crates/frankenlibc-fuzz/fuzz_targets/fuzz_c11threads.rs covers
the C11 threads surface:

  mtx_init / _destroy / _lock / _trylock / _timedlock / _unlock
  cnd_init / _destroy / _signal / _broadcast / _timedwait
  tss_create / _set / _delete
  call_once
  thrd_create / _join / _detach / _sleep

10 op variants. C11 threads aliases onto pthread types
(ThrdT = pthread_t, MtxT = pthread_mutex_t, ...) so bugs here
manifest as bugs in the pthread backend surfaced through a
different name; this harness is the second tripwire after the
five pthread-family harnesses shipped this session.

Key invariants:
- Return-code contract: rc >= 0 on every call (C11 thrd_success
  = 0, thrd_error = 1, thrd_busy = 2, thrd_nomem = 3,
  thrd_timedout = 4 — all non-negative).
- call_once exactly-once: after N invocations on the same flag,
  the registered init fires exactly once (per-op counter delta
  == 1).
- thrd_create → thrd_join round-trip returns the worker's exit
  code (0 from fuzz_thrd_worker).
- cnd_signal / cnd_broadcast on a condvar with no waiter is a
  no-op (rc 0), not an error.
- thrd_sleep with 1 µs duration never blocks libFuzzer and
  returns 0 or a positive interrupt code.

Deliberately NOT exercised:
- thrd_exit (`-> !`) — would terminate the fuzz process.
- Multi-thread cnd_wait signaling (needs TSan campaign, not
  in-process single-threaded).

Validation: cargo build + cargo clippy --no-deps -- -D warnings
clean first-try.

## bd-dvr22 non-TSan drain status: **COMPLETE**

Eight priorities originally enumerated; all now have shipping
fuzz targets:

 1. mmap ................ fuzz_mmap
 2. signal .............. fuzz_signal
 3. socket .............. fuzz_socket
 4. fortify ............. fuzz_fortify
 5. setjmp .............. fuzz_setjmp
 6. dlfcn ............... fuzz_dlfcn
 7. pthread ............. fuzz_pthread_mutex / _cond / _keys /
                          _rwlock / _sync_misc (5 sub-harnesses)
 8. c11threads .......... fuzz_c11threads (this commit)

Remaining follow-up (all tracked in bd-dvr22):
- TSan campaign for pthread + c11threads race coverage.
- Fork-based fuzz_fortify_abort harness for the __chk_fail
  overflow-trip path.
- dlsym(RTLD_NEXT) libc-differential plumbing for fuzz_env /
  fuzz_pathname / fuzz_sched / fuzz_pidfd_timer / fuzz_socket.
- Tmpdir-seeded symlink graph for fuzz_pathname host parity on
  stat / readlink.

Agent: cc-libc
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -115,6 +115,11 @@ name = "fuzz_pthread_sync_misc"
 path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_pthread_sync_misc.rs"
 doc = false
 
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_c11threads"
+path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_c11threads.rs"
+doc = false
+
 [[bin]]
 name = "fuzz_resolver"
 path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_resolver.rs"
